user_query: My CBC: Hemoglobin = 10.2 g/dL, WBC = 12.5, Platelets = 450 Normal ranges: Hgb 12-16, WBC 4.5-11, Platelets 150-400
llm_response: ## 🔴 Hemoglobin (Hgb) — LOW **Your Value:** 10.2 g/dL **Normal Range:** 12.0 – 16.0 g/dL **Status:** Below Normal  ### What is Hemoglobin? Hemoglobin is a protein found inside your red blood cells. Its job is to carry oxygen from your lungs to every part of your body, and carry carbon dioxide back to your lungs to be exhaled.  ### What Does Your Result Mean?
